prompt: hey so i've been doing a lot of data cleaning work in python lately and i keep having to explain the same pandas patterns over and over to claude. stuff like handling missing values, deduplicating rows, normalizing column names, converting types. can you turn this into a reusable skill? i mainly work with csv files and sometimes parquet
assertions: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions mentioning data cleaning or pandas
The SKILL.md body covers handling missing values with code examples
The SKILL.md body covers deduplication with code examples
The SKILL.md body covers column name normalization or type conversion
The SKILL.md body uses progressive disclosure by referencing separate files for detailed patterns
An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
The SKILL.md body contains a workflow or ordered checklist for the cleaning pipeline
